measurement_note: Size is G, the number of sale dates; the legal 8/32/128 tiers span 16x and contain four rows per date, including one duplicate among three distinct products. Deduplication, one global product ordering, and grouped aggregation process the relation in O(R + P log P) time. A correct correlated-subquery formulation rescans all R rows for every date, grows as O(GR), completes normally at G = 128, and is rejected by scaling.
